rads: Background source: trace cobalt-60 in surface vents.

/overseer.log.content:
ENTRY 487 // OVERSEER GARRETT
----------------------------------------
Morale stable. The residents do not suspect.
Vault-Tec confirmed our supply rotation is on schedule.
Protocol 06 holding.

They trust me. That's what makes this work.

ENTRY 488
The Vance girl asked again about the surface.
I told her the radiation was still too high.
She is twelve. She has never seen the sun.

/protocol/briefing.txt.content:
VAULT 73 — STATED PURPOSE
----------------------------------------
Long-term radiation shelter for 100 residents.
Water & food reserves: 50 years.
Reentry timeline: at Overseer's discretion.

(All residents have been told reentry is mandatory in 10 years.)

/protocol/directive_06.txt.crackSuccessMessage: TERMLINK CRACKED. ATTEMPT LOGGED TO VAULT-TEC HQ.
/protocol/directive_06.txt.content:
DIRECTIVE 06 // EYES ONLY
----------------------------------------
Vault 73 is a social isolation experiment.
Never open the door. Never tell the residents.

If morale fails: refer to Contingency 08 (purge gas).

Thank you for your service to Vault-Tec.
WAR. WAR NEVER CHANGES.

/residents/roster.txt.content:
VAULT 73 ROSTER (current)
----------------------------------------
  102 residents
   17 children under 12
    8 staff
    1 overseer (Garrett, V.)

Last birth: 2298 (Hannah Vance)
Last death: 2299 (Cpt. Mendez, age 71)

/residents/vance_h.dat.content:
HANNAH VANCE — age 12
  born inside Vault 73
  parents: Mira Vance (deceased '94), Jonas Vance (terminated for asking questions)
  flagged: "unusually curious" — Garrett's note
  recommendation: monitor.

/holotapes/orientation.txt.content:
[HOLOTAPE — ORIENTATION, 2078]

Welcome, friend. You are now a resident of Vault 73.
Your safety is Vault-Tec's promise.
Your Overseer's word is law.
Your patience is the price of survival.

— Vault-Tec. The Future Begins Tomorrow.

/holotapes/final_message.txt.content:
[HOLOTAPE — UNDATED, recovered]

This is Jonas Vance.
The door opens. I checked. The mechanism works.
Garrett knows. He lied.
If anyone finds this — Hannah, if you find this — 
run toward the surface. The radiation outside is
[recording ends]

/experiment.dat.crackFailMessage: VAULT-TEC ENCRYPTION HARDENED. TERMLINK SUBROUTINE INSUFFICIENT.
/experiment.dat.content:
// VAULT-TEC INTERNAL — DESTROY ON ACCESS //

Vault 73 is one of 122 isolation experiments.
Results so far:
  V-21  — population overcrowding (failed, 2287)
  V-27  — all-female cloning (paused)
  V-73  — 200-year isolation (ACTIVE)
  V-87  — F.E.V. exposure (catastrophic)
  V-101 — single overseer (active)

War. War never changes.

[corruption: end of record]
